framework.name: Data Security Trade-off in Off-the-Shelf Solutions
framework.description: Off-the-shelf AI platforms present underestimated data security risks as proprietary operational data flows through third-party infrastructure, creating compliance and competitive intelligence exposure that manufacturers often miss during evaluation.
framework.raw_quote: While these platforms may appear secure, your operational data flows through third-party infrastructure, raising concerns about proprietary information exposure, compliance requirements, and long-term data governance that many manufacturers underestimate during evaluation

source.title: AI Software Development: Why 95% Of Enterprise Pilots Fail - USM
